name: TET2 CHIP canakinumab vascular-inflammation registry
summary: Recruiting randomized double-blind placebo-controlled phase 2 study of canakinumab in coronary artery disease with and without TET2 clonal hematopoiesis, measuring vascular inflammation and TET2 variant allele fraction.
population: Adults and older adults with coronary artery disease, including a planned half of participants with TET2 clonal hematopoiesis
